name: YouTube Manager
description: Upload character reveal videos, trailer clips, and lore narrations to YouTube. Manage video metadata from entity fields.
author: BiloxiStudios

panels.label: YouTube Videos
panels.description: Linked YouTube videos for this entity

panels.label: Video Manager
panels.description: Full upload and video management interface

youtube_api_key.label: YouTube API Key
youtube_api_key.description: API key for YouTube Data API v3

default_category.label: Default Category
default_category.description: Default YouTube video category (e.g. Gaming, Entertainment, Film & Animation)

default_privacy.label: Default Privacy
default_privacy.description: Privacy status for uploads (public, unlisted, private)

description_template.label: Description Template
description_template.description: Template for auto-generated descriptions. Use {name}, {type}, {description}, {tags} placeholders.
